content: Is aigis or winkle better for uvhash?
There both pretty good
If you are lacking embryo's and want a one time stun, go Aigis
If you are lacking Aliemus for Exalts and want Weakness application, go Uvhash

Winkle E3 = two exalts in the same turn
You can start or keep rerolling till you have everything you want. Its up to you, how hard you want to min-max

Depends on what kind of team you have, and eventually want. With Caecus, he is mostly used for Aequor or Counter teams. However, Caecus can easily slot into alot of teams for his Exalt being extremely flexible. Celeste is flexed into any team for her heals/revive/weakness application. Goliath is used in teams that Strrenght Stack n Scale, and he himself scales of Strength as well. There are use cases for Goliath in Burst Tentacle teams due to how his Exalt works in Aequor, granting the team a bunch of Temp Str and Perm Tentacle Dmg.

Mono Chaos team will be harder to manage, since you don't have access to Tentacle Stance or Crimsum Furnace, which both help a ton with keeping you alive. I would recommened going Aequor Chaos, as you have access to Tentacle Stance(White Stance for Shield, Red Stance for Burst Turn). Aequor Chaos is also easier and safer to play, where Mono Chaos is more complex and needs more investments to work "better" then other forms of Chaos(For Tawil).
